description.value: Price 8,100 gp; Slot ring; CL 5th; Weight â; Aura faint conjuration [law] DESCRIPTION This ring resembles a gear or cog. If the wearer can cast summon monster spells, the wearer adds arbiter to the 3rd-level list of monsters she can summon with those spells, adds zelekhut to the 7th-level list, adds kolyarut to the 8th-level list, and adds marut to the 9th-level list. Also, once per day on command the wearer can use this ring to summon an arbiter, as if by the summon monster III spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 4,050 gp; Feats Forge Ring; Spells planar ally or planar binding; Special creator must be lawful neutral
